name: Snowshoe Naan
recipeIngredient: 4 to 5 cups Unbleached hard white or all-purpose flour
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the warm water in a large bread bowl, add the yeast, and stir.
2. Add whole wheat flour and 1 cup of white flour, stirring well.
3. Continue stirring for one minute to develop gluten by rotating in the same direction.
4. Let the sponge stand for 30 minutes to 3 hours, covered.
5. Sprinkle salt over the sponge, then add another cup of flour and stir.
6. Continue adding flour and stirring until you can no longer stir.
7. Turn dough out onto a lightly floured surface and knead thoroughly, about ten minutes, until smooth and easy to handle.
8. Clean the bowl, oil lightly, and return the dough to the bowl. Cover with plastic wrap and let rise in a convenient place for 2 to 3 hours.
9. When the dough has more than doubled in volume, gently press down and turn out onto a lightly floured surface.
10. Divide the dough into eight equal pieces and shape each into a flat oval, approximately 4x8 inches long.
11. Leave these flat disks on the work surface and cover with plastic wrap to let rise for about 20 minutes.
12. Place quarry tiles or large baking stone on a rack in the lower third of your oven, leaving at least 1 inch space between the tiles and the oven wall.
13. Preheat the oven to 450°F (230°C).
14. Five minutes after the oven has preheated, begin shaping the first bread.
15. Dip fingertips in cold water, then make tightly spaced indentations all over the dough surface using both hands.
16. Stretch the dough gently into a long oval strip by draping it over both hands and pulling apart slowly.
17. Place the bread back on the work surface, sprinkle with a pinch of black onion seeds, and transfer to heated quarry tiles or stone.
18. Bake for approximately 4 minutes. Breads can be baked side by side across the oven when one is halfway done.
19. When done, the breads will have golden patches on top and a crusty browned bottom surface.
20. Wrap breads in a cotton cloth to keep them warm and soft for about five minutes after removal from the oven.
21. Serve warm or at room temperature.
